title: Patrick A. Bolger, PhD
text: Patrick Bolger is a Community Development Champion in the School of Psychology at the University of Nottingham in the United Kingdom. He works mostly with the team at Open Science Tools, Ltd. (the makers of the open-source software for psychological experiments PsychoPy, and its online sister, Pavlovia). He is funded by an Essential Open Source Software for Science grant from the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative.
